title: NeuralPLexer3: Accurate Biomolecular Complex Structure Prediction with Flow Models
task: generalized biomolecular complex structure prediction; protein-ligand complex structure prediction; biomolecular interaction structure prediction; ligand-induced conformational change prediction; confidence estimation for predicted biomolecular complexes
evaluation_benchmarks: PoseBusters-V2; NPBench; low-homology post-2023 PDB evaluation set; CASP15 RNA targets; ConfBench
training_data: PLINDER; OpenProteinSet; OrbNet conformers; recent PDB bioassemblies
method_components: physics-inspired flow-based generative model; conditional flow matching; continuous normalizing flow; flow-based encoder-decoder structure prediction model; informative globular polymer prior; Langevin dynamics prior relaxation; optimal transport structure permutation; Flash-TriangularAttention; confidence module; pLDDT/pDockQ-based sample ranking
baselines: NeuralPLexer2; AlphaFold 3; AlphaFold2-Multimer; Vina; GOLD; Uni-Mol; EquiBind; TankBind; DiffDock
auxiliary_tools: pLDDT/pDockQ sample ranking; OrbNet conformer generation
metrics: RMSD < 2 angstrom success rate; ligand RMSD; PB-valid success rate / PoseBusters validity; ligand stereochemistry accuracy; LDDT; DockQ > 0.23 success rate; TM-score; pLDDT; pDockQ; ConfBench score; pocket_fident; bb_LDDT; inference time / prediction speed
review_notes: Broader than ligand docking: covers proteins, nucleic acids, ligands, ions, PTMs and multiple interaction types. Training/curation sources are separated from evaluation benchmarks in this schema.

title: FlowDock: Geometric Flow Matching for Generative Protein-Ligand Docking and Affinity Prediction
task: flexible protein-ligand docking; protein-ligand complex structure prediction; protein-ligand binding affinity prediction; multi-ligand docking; apo-to-holo protein-ligand structure generation
evaluation_benchmarks: PoseBusters Benchmark / PoseBench PoseBusters set; DockGen-E; CASP16 ligand category; Astex Diverse subset
external_test_sets: DockGen-E; CASP16 ligand category; Astex Diverse subset
method_components: geometric flow matching; conditional flow matching; deep geometric generative model; hybrid structure-and-affinity prediction model; apo-to-holo structure generation; harmonic ligand prior; ESMFold protein prior; fine-tuned NeuralPLexer architecture; generalized unbalanced flow matching; VD-ODE sampler; confidence head / pLDDT; binding affinity head
baselines: AlphaFold 3; Chai-1; DynamicBind; TankBind; GIGN; TransformerCPI; MONN
auxiliary_tools: ESMFold protein prior; confidence head; binding affinity head
metrics: blind docking success rate; RMSD <= 2 angstrom and PB-Valid success rate; ligand RMSD; binding pocket conformation RMSD; pLDDT / structural confidence; Pearson correlation; Spearman correlation; RMSE; MAE; CASP16 affinity-ranking position; runtime; CPU memory usage; GPU memory usage; TM-score and RMSD apo-to-holo training filters
review_notes: CASP16 is treated as an external evaluation track. PLINDER is separated as training/fine-tuning data rather than main evaluation data.

title: Harmonic Self-Conditioned Flow Matching for joint Multi-Ligand Docking and Binding Site Design
task: multi-ligand docking; pocket-level protein-ligand docking; 3D protein-ligand binding structure generation; binding site design; protein pocket residue design for small-molecule binding; joint residue-type and ligand-pose generation
evaluation_benchmarks: PDBBind time split; PDBBind sequence similarity split; Binding MOAD sequence similarity split
external_test_sets: PDBBind sequence similarity split; Binding MOAD sequence similarity split
method_components: harmonic self-conditioned flow matching; self-conditioned flow matching; harmonic prior; equivariant refinement TFN layers; joint discrete-continuous flow; fake-ligand data augmentation; invariant graph attention network
baselines: product-space diffusion baseline; EigenFold diffusion baseline; ProteinMPNN; PiFold; random ligand position; DiffDock-Pocket pose; ground-truth pose oracle
metrics: RMSD; fraction of predictions with RMSD < 2 angstrom; fraction of predictions with RMSD < 5 angstrom; median RMSD; sequence recovery; BLOSUM score; runtime
review_notes: Baselines are now separated from proposed method and method components.

title: Composing Unbalanced Flows for Flexible Docking and Relaxation
task: flexible protein-ligand docking; pocket-based flexible docking; structure relaxation; protein flexibility modeling; apo-to-holo conformational change modeling; generation of energetically favorable / physically valid docking poses
evaluation_benchmarks: PDBBind ESMFold docking benchmark; PoseBusters v2 / PoseBusters benchmark
method_components: Flow Matching; manifold docking flow / manifold Unbalanced FM; Euclidean relaxation flow / structure relaxation Unbalanced FM; confidence discriminator; energy-based loss; flat-bottom potential; energy filtering; SE(3) and side-chain torsion flow
baselines: DiffDock-Pocket; SMINA; GNINA; RE-DOCK; DeepDock; UniMol; GOLD; VINA; UMOL; AlphaFold3
auxiliary_tools: ESMFold predicted structures; PoseBusters checks; OpenMM-style energy evaluation
metrics: ligand RMSD; median ligand RMSD; percentage of ligand RMSD < 2 angstrom; pocket all-atom RMSD / AA-RMSD; percentage of all-atom RMSD < 1 angstrom; PoseBusters checks; PB-valid; PB-valid and ligand RMSD < 2 angstrom; runtime; proportion of energetically favorable poses
review_notes: Comparison baselines are separated from the proposed method.

title: ForceFM: Enhancing Protein-Ligand Predictions through Force-Guided Flow Matching
task: protein-ligand docking; molecular docking; binding pose prediction; physically plausible ligand conformation generation; low-energy ligand pose generation; blind self-docking; cross-domain docking generalization evaluation
evaluation_benchmarks: PDBBind time split; PoseBusters Benchmark; DockGen test set / DockGen cross-domain benchmark
external_test_sets: DockGen test set / DockGen cross-domain benchmark
method_components: force-guided flow matching; force-guidance network / force model; manifold flow matching; Riemannian flow matching; energy-guided generation; RDKit ETKDG conformer initialization
baselines: DiffDock; FABind; FABind+; EquiBind; TankBind; E3Bind; KarmaDock; DeltaDock; HelixDock
auxiliary_tools: Vina-guided generation; Glide-guided generation; Gnina-guided generation; Confscore/Conf-guided generation; RDKit ETKDG conformer initialization
metrics: ligand RMSD; mean RMSD; RMSD <= 2 angstrom success rate; RMSD <= 5 angstrom success rate; RMSD percentiles; centroid distance; mean centroid distance; centroid distance <= 2 angstrom; centroid distance <= 5 angstrom; PoseBusters pass rate / physical validity; average runtime; inference cost; number of sampling steps / convergence speed
review_notes: Vina, Glide, Gnina and Confscore are guidance/scoring functions rather than metrics; they are moved to auxiliary_tools.
